name: Spinach-Artichoke Dip (Chicago Style)
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces Artichoke Hearts, drained and chopped
10 ounces chopped spinach, frozen, thawed - squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream and 1/4 cup of Parmesan cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Stir in the spinach and artichokes. Mix well.
3. Cover the top with Monterey Jack cheese and the remaining Parmesan cheese.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F.
5. Broil for about 5 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown.
6. Serve with vegetables or crackers.
